title: Primitive Source of Truth
summary: Unified cn helper imports, removed duplicate toast system with hard-coded colors, verified shadcn primitives use design tokens exclusively.

rationale.cnConsolidation: Found 3 duplicate cn helper functions across src/lib/utils.ts, src/lib/cn.ts, and src/lib/design-system/utils.ts. Deleted duplicates and updated 8 shadcn components to import from canonical @/lib/utils location.
rationale.toastConsolidation: Identified two toast systems: (1) Sonner via src/lib/utils/toast.ts (actively used), (2) shadcn/ui toast via @/hooks/use-toast (actively used in 12 account/settings forms), (3) src/components/Toast.tsx with hard-coded green/red/orange/blue colors (dead code, not rendered anywhere). Removed the third system.
rationale.primitiveVerification: Ran hex scanner and ESLint against src/components/ui/* - zero hard-coded colors found in shadcn primitives. All components use semantic tokens via Tailwind classes (bg-primary, text-foreground, border-border, etc.).

verification.cnHelper: ✅ Single cn utility at src/lib/utils.ts, all components import from @/lib/utils
verification.toastSystems: ✅ Two toast systems remain (Sonner for simple toasts, shadcn for complex form toasts), dead duplicate removed
verification.primitiveTokens: ✅ All shadcn components use design tokens, zero hex/rgb/hsl values in src/components/ui/*.tsx
verification.hexScanner: ✅ Hex scanner passes with no violations
verification.importHygiene: ✅ All shadcn primitives import cn from @/lib/utils

mitigated.risk: R5 - Duplicate helpers and toast stacks
mitigated.mitigation: Deleted 2 duplicate cn helpers and 1 duplicate toast component; centralized imports

outOfScope.marketingColors: ESLint reports hard-coded colors in marketing pages (hero-split.tsx, hero-video.tsx, variations/startup/page.tsx) and SVG brand logos (tech-stack-section.tsx). These are JAR-03 scope, not shadcn primitives.

nextSteps: JAR-03: Fix hard-coded colors in marketing components
JAR-03: Add ESLint exceptions for legitimate SVG brand colors
JAR-03: Extract motion variants and add a11y guards
